에베소서 5:1.content: Be therefore imitators of God, as beloved children.

에베소서 5:2.content: Walk in love, even as Christ also loved us and gave himself up for us, an offering and a sacrifice to God for a sweet-smelling fragrance.

에베소서 5:3.content: But sexual immorality, and all uncleanness or covetousness, let it not even be mentioned among you, as becomes saints;

에베소서 5:4.content: nor filthiness, nor foolish talking, nor jesting, which are not appropriate, but rather giving of thanks.

에베소서 5:5.content: Know this for sure, that no sexually immoral person, nor unclean person, nor covetous man, who is an idolater, has any inheritance in the Kingdom of Christ and God.

에베소서 5:6.content: Let no one deceive you with empty words. For because of these things, the wrath of God comes on the children of disobedience.

에베소서 5:7.content: Therefore don’t be partakers with them.

에베소서 5:8.content: For you were once darkness, but are now light in the Lord. Walk as children of light,

에베소서 5:9.content: for the fruit of the Spirit is in all goodness and righteousness and truth,

에베소서 5:10.content: proving what is well pleasing to the Lord.

에베소서 5:11.content: Have no fellowship with the unfruitful deeds of darkness, but rather even reprove them.

에베소서 5:12.content: For it is a shame even to speak of the things which are done by them in secret.

에베소서 5:13.content: But all things, when they are reproved, are revealed by the light, for everything that reveals is light.

에베소서 5:14.content: Therefore he says, “Awake, you who sleep, and arise from the dead, and Christ will shine on you.”

에베소서 5:15.content: Therefore watch carefully how you walk, not as unwise, but as wise,

에베소서 5:16.content: redeeming the time, because the days are evil.

에베소서 5:17.content: Therefore don’t be foolish, but understand what the will of the Lord is.

에베소서 5:18.content: Don’t be drunken with wine, in which is dissipation, but be filled with the Spirit,

에베소서 5:19.content: speaking to one another in psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; singing and making melody in your heart to the Lord;

에베소서 5:20.content: giving thanks always concerning all things in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, to God, even the Father;

에베소서 5:21.content: subjecting yourselves to one another in the fear of Christ.

에베소서 5:22.content: Wives, be subject to your own husbands, as to the Lord.

에베소서 5:23.content: For the husband is the head of the wife, as Christ also is the head of the assembly, being himself the savior of the body.

에베소서 5:24.content: But as the assembly is subject to Christ, so let the wives also be to their own husbands in everything.

에베소서 5:25.content: Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the assembly, and gave himself up for it;

에베소서 5:26.content: that he might sanctify it, having cleansed it by the washing of water with the word,

에베소서 5:27.content: that he might present the assembly to himself gloriously, not having spot or wrinkle or any such thing; but that it should be holy and without defect.

에베소서 5:28.content: Even so husbands also ought to love their own wives as their own bodies. He who loves his own wife loves himself.

에베소서 5:29.content: For no man ever hated his own flesh; but nourishes and cherishes it, even as the Lord also does the assembly;

에베소서 5:30.content: because we are members of his body, of his flesh and bones.

에베소서 5:31.content: “For this cause a man will leave his father and mother, and will be joined to his wife. The two will become one flesh.”

에베소서 5:32.content: This mystery is great, but I speak concerning Christ and of the assembly.

에베소서 5:33.content: Nevertheless each of you must also love his own wife even as himself; and let the wife see that she respects her husband.
